title: Villager Shop
description: A fully customizable villager shop for players!
body:
# Villager Shop

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/villager-shop?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/villager-shop)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wmX_vQKgw30" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## 📖 Description

A fully customizable villager shop for players! Now you can craft the Villager Shop item, after placing the Villager Shop you will receive a Key, that's Key is for access to the Villager Shop Menu, in the menu you can config their trades, profession, biome, rotation, glowing, and the option to remove the Villager Shop too!

---

## ❗Compatibility

- Compatible with [Claims](https://modrinth.com/datapack/claims)!

---

## ⌨️ Commands

Give villager shop:

```mcfunction
/loot give @s loot villager_shop:villager_shop
```

Uninstall:

1. Run `/function villager_shop:uninstall`.
2. Run `/datapack disable <datapack>`.
3. If there any entity of Villager Shop left, run `/kill @e[tag=villager_shop.entity]`.
